title: Buttery Fluffy Yogurt Soup with Black Cardamom
description: This low-calorie-friendly and post-workout Spanish dish combines fluffy yogurt with a hint of black cardamom for an invigorating start to the day.
instructions: Boil water in a large pot and add salt and black pepper. Crush the black cardamom pods slightly.
Pour Greek Yogurt into boiling water while stirring continuously to prevent it from curdling.
Continue simmering for about 5 minutes, or until desired consistency is reached.
Remove pot from heat and discard crushed cardamom pods, as they are not meant to be consumed.
Stir in vanilla extract for a touch of sweetness and flavor enhancement.
